title: trond diagnose output
description: Returned by `trond diagnose <node> -o json`. Structured health report; agents should process failed checks first and follow each check's suggestions[] in order.

overall.description: Aggregate verdict: fail iff any check failed; warning iff any check warned and none failed.

message.description: Human-readable summary; not stable across versions.

suggestions.description: Ordered fix proposals; suggestions[0] is the most likely fix.

details.description: Check-specific structured data (e.g. observed peer count, disk free bytes).
